description: MLExplain seed data -- sample experiment configurations

algorithm_descriptions.decision_tree: Interpretable tree-based classifier using Gini impurity
algorithm_descriptions.random_forest: Ensemble of decision trees with bootstrap aggregation
algorithm_descriptions.svm: Support Vector Machine with kernel trick for non-linear boundaries
algorithm_descriptions.knn: Instance-based classifier using nearest neighbour voting
algorithm_descriptions.logistic_regression: Linear model for classification via log-odds

dataset_notes.iris: Best for introductory ML demos; small, clean, well-separated classes
dataset_notes.wine: Good for demonstrating feature importance with 13 chemical features
dataset_notes.breast_cancer: Binary classification with 30 features; tests high-dimensional models
dataset_notes.digits: Multi-class (10 classes) with 64 features; tests model scalability
